scripts.dev:custom-llm: concurrently -n llm,backend,frontend -c yellow,blue,green "bun run dev:custom-llm:llm" "bun run dev:custom-llm:backend" "bun run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:custom-llm:llm: cd custom-llm && bash -c '(venv/bin/python -m pip --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || (rm -rf venv && python3 -m venv venv)) && source venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install -q -r requirements.txt && python src/custom_llm_server.py'
scripts.dev:custom-llm:backend: cd custom-llm && bash -c 'sleep 2 && (venv/bin/python -m pip --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || (rm -rf venv && python3 -m venv venv)) && source venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install -q -r requirements.txt && python src/server.py'
scripts.dev:audio-modalities: concurrently -n audio,backend,frontend -c yellow,blue,green "bun run dev:audio-modalities:llm" "bun run dev:audio-modalities:backend" "bun run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:audio-modalities:llm: cd audio-modalities && bash -c '(venv/bin/python -m pip --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || (rm -rf venv && python3 -m venv venv)) && source venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install -q -r requirements.txt && python src/audio_llm_server.py'
scripts.dev:audio-modalities:backend: cd audio-modalities && bash -c 'sleep 2 && (venv/bin/python -m pip --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || (rm -rf venv && python3 -m venv venv)) && source venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install -q -r requirements.txt && python src/server.py'
scripts.dev:frontend: cd web && AGENT_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:8000 bun run dev
scripts.setup:custom-llm: bash -c 'test -f custom-llm/.env.local || cp custom-llm/.env.example custom-llm/.env.local' && cd custom-llm && rm -rf venv && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:audio-modalities: bash -c 'test -f audio-modalities/.env.local || cp audio-modalities/.env.example audio-modalities/.env.local' && cd audio-modalities && rm -rf venv && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:
bun run setup:web && echo '
✅ Web dependencies installed. Now setup a recipe:
   bun run setup:custom-llm
   bun run setup:audio-modalities
'
scripts.clean: rm -rf custom-llm/venv audio-modalities/venv node_modules web/node_modules web/.next
